items.title: UPQODE website approval blocking launch
items.summary: Website revisions need final approval today. Team is blocked and cannot push to production. Client demo scheduled for tomorrow morning.
items.actionNeeded: Review and approve website copy changes to unblock production deployment.

items.title: Partnership proposal from Hydrate IV Bar
items.summary: Hydrate IV Bar wants to discuss co-branded IV therapy packages for Miami and Houston locations. They have budget allocated and want to move quickly.
items.actionNeeded: Respond with availability for Thursday or Friday call to discuss partnership.

items.title: Podcast interview May 22 time change request
items.summary: Dr. Haas requested to shift Aging Well Podcast interview from 10:30am to 12pm EST on May 22 due to house closing that morning. Interview Valet coordinating.
items.actionNeeded: Confirm if the time change to 12pm EST works or provide alternative.
